summary: Implemented Phase 4: the observer analysis overlay now mounts for both replay viewers and live spectators, while active players remain unaffected. Preference storage now uses the observer-oriented key and still reads the legacy replay key.
gameplay_impact: Live spectators now get the same analysis panel for army value, production, unit counts, losses, and resources-lost tabs that replay viewers already had. Active players still do not see the overlay or receive observer UI affordances.
next_executor_notes: Final client module name is `ObserverAnalysisOverlay`; mount policy helper is `shouldMountObserverAnalysisOverlay` in `client/src/observer_analysis_overlay.js`. CSS class names with `replay-` prefixes are intentionally retained as compatibility aliases/styling hooks.
manual_test_notes: Later manual testing should open a replay and a live spectator match, confirm the overlay appears and updates, and check collapse/show/tab switches plus camera wheel zoom, middle-mouse drag pan, keyboard pan, minimap drag, settings clicks, replay timeline, speed, and vision controls.
